title: Overnight Drift IS Baseline -- NQ daily 2013-2022, IS only, measurement-validity gate first
1_2_3_provenance_note: Frozen S30 rules (S30-D2 275540f) executed by the committed S30-D3 engine (3c8dfff) on IS data only. No engine/test/spec change. HEAD at run = 3c8dfff (the S30-D3 commit).

5_oos_exclusion.confirmation: 2023/2024/2025 CSVs were NOT read. Enforced by validation_is_runner.assert_is_only_paths (path seal) AND assert_bars_in_is_range over years 2013-2022 (bar seal). OOS remains sealed.

7_measurement_validity.critical_caveat: The reconstruction check ((overnight)+(day_session) == total_day) is an ALGEBRAIC IDENTITY for any bar with finite prices, so PASS (error 0.0) only proves internal arithmetic consistency. It does NOT prove the futures daily open/close prints bracket the TRUE cash overnight session (4pm->9:30am ET) the overnight-drift anomaly lives in. NQ trades nearly 24h on Globex with a 00:00 UTC daily boundary; the strongly negative overnight result below is consistent with the daily-bar open/close NOT representing the cash overnight window -- the S30-D2 section-4 representativeness risk. Settling representativeness requires intraday/session-level data not held offline.

top_day_dependence_gate.note: net is ALREADY negative before removing winners; removing the top winners makes it more negative. The gate fails because there is no positive net to defend.

9_s30_d2_prescreen.high_observation_count: PASS -- 3078 observations (>= every eligible day 2013-2022); count is not the problem.
9_s30_d2_prescreen.positive_average_overnight_return: FAIL -- average is NEGATIVE (-0.735 pts / -0.0116% per night).
9_s30_d2_prescreen.positive_after_top_day_removal: FAIL -- net is negative and worsens ex-top-3 (-2883.75) and ex-top-1% (-4264.75).
9_s30_d2_prescreen.enough_positive_years: FAIL -- only 3/10 positive years (<5 WATCH / <6 PASS floor).
9_s30_d2_prescreen.friction_headroom_preliminary: FAIL -- there is no edge to erode: the strategy is net negative BEFORE any fee/slippage, so friction headroom is moot (negative).

11_conservative_interpretation.is_fail_meaning: IS_FAIL means PARK or redesign as a NEW pre-registered branch -- it does NOT mean tune this branch. No parameter, leg, filter, or direction change may be applied to S30 to rescue it; any such change is a new branch with a fresh frozen spec.
11_conservative_interpretation.why_fail: The frozen long-overnight hypothesis is net NEGATIVE in-sample on NQ daily futures bars (PF 0.65, avg -0.735 pts, 3/10 positive years, fails the top-day gate). The hypothesized positive overnight risk premium is NOT present as measured.
11_conservative_interpretation.measurement_nuance: MEASUREMENT_VALID here is only arithmetic consistency. The negative result most likely reflects that the NQ futures daily open/close do not represent the cash-session overnight window where the documented anomaly lives (the S30-D2 section-4 risk). This is a measurement-representativeness failure of the DATA for this hypothesis, not a bug in the engine.
11_conservative_interpretation.no_oos: OOS 2023-2025 stays SEALED. An IS_FAIL never advances to OOS.
11_conservative_interpretation.no_promotion: No paper/live promotion. No active strategy.

12_recommended_next_step.decision: STOP / PARK S30 overnight-drift (long-only, NQ daily futures) -- do NOT pre-register S30-D5 OOS.
12_recommended_next_step.rationale: An IS_FAIL is not eligible for an OOS protocol. The branch is parked alongside Donchian/S26/S27/S28/S29.
12_recommended_next_step.optional_future_branch_not_authorized: If the overnight-drift idea is to be revisited, it requires (a) cash-session / intraday data that actually brackets the true overnight window (not held offline), and (b) a brand-new frozen spec and branch id. That is a separate, separately-authorized effort -- NOT a tune of S30.

trading_recommendation: NONE. IS baseline result only. S30 overnight-drift (long-only, NQ daily futures) is IS_FAIL and is PARKED. Donchian, S26, S27, S28, S29 remain PARKED. No active strategy; no paper/live system exists or is authorized. OOS remains sealed.
